fundamentals.name: Astera Labs, Inc.
fundamentals.longBusinessSummary: Astera Labs, Inc. designs, manufactures, and sells semiconductor-based connectivity solutions for cloud and AI infrastructure. It offers an intelligent connectivity platform, comprised of semiconductor-based, high-speed, mixed-signal connectivity products that integrate a matrix of microcontrollers and sensors, and COSMOS. The company provides COSMOS software suite, a connectivity system management and optimization software that enables management and optimization of resources for large fleets at cloud-scale via link, fleet, and RAS management capabilities. In addition, it offers PCIe/CXL smart DSP retimers and cable modules; ethernet smart cable modules for cloud and AI infrastructure; CXL memory connectivity controllers; and smart fabric switches. The company serves hyperscalers and system original equipment manufacturers. Astera Labs, Inc. was incorporated in 2017 and is based in San Jose, California.

judgment.summary: High-growth company with exceptional revenue and earnings expansion, but carries a premium valuation and significant leverage.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last quarter beat EPS estimates by 13.5%; next earnings date is 2026-08-04.
positives: Revenue growth 93.4% YoY and earnings growth 144.4% YoY indicate strong business expansion.
Gross margin 76.0% and profit margin 26.7% demonstrate efficient operations and pricing power.
Return on equity 21.1% and return on assets 10.1% show effective use of capital.
Current ratio 11.30 and quick ratio 10.55 indicate excellent short-term liquidity.
Free cash flow of $240.00M provides operational flexibility.
negatives: Trailing P/E of 233.20 and forward P/E of 81.49 are exceptionally high, indicating a very rich valuation.
Price/Sales (TTM) of 58.67 and Price/Book of 39.30 also suggest the stock is trading at a significant premium.
Debt/Equity ratio of 2.80 is high, indicating substantial leverage.
Analyst mean target of $244.97 is below the current spot price, suggesting limited upside according to consensus.
Beta of 3.36 indicates higher volatility than the broader market.

news.paragraph: Astera Labs has seen significant positive momentum, with its stock climbing over 30% recently following analyst upgrades and a 'golden cross' technical signal. Two analysts have initiated coverage with 'bullish' ratings, highlighting the company's strong growth trajectory. The stock's upward trend is supported by impressive revenue and earnings growth, though its high valuation metrics suggest significant future growth is already priced in.
